search.query: sourcetype="apex" index="*" field_name="Utilization Total" |stats latest(_time) as _time by apex_dashboard | sort 0 - _time | head 1 | table apex_dashboard | rename apex_dashboard as url_token

html.a: Click here to visit the Apex dashboard

html.div:
No Apex Dashboard Available
No events received in the last 24 hours. Check your Apex configuration and ensure events are being sent to Splunk.
Configure Add-on Settings

chart.title: Utilization By Device Over Last 24 Hours

search.query: sourcetype="apex" index="*" field_name="Utilization Total" | where isnotnull(device) AND isnotnull(interface) | eval util=replace(current_value, "%", "") | timechart span=5m avg(util) by device

table.title: Average utilization per device/interface over last 60 minutes

search.query: sourcetype="apex" index="*" field_name = "Utilization Total" | where isnotnull(device) AND isnotnull(interface) | eval util=replace(current_value, "%", "") | stats avg(util) AS avg_util BY device, interface | eval "Utilization Total"=tostring(avg_util, "commas") | table device, interface, "Utilization Total"
